q: Describe an adventurous person you know
cue_card: And explain why you think they are adventurous
examiner_note: Hãy tập trung vào việc mô tả chi tiết describe an adventurous person you know.

samples.band7: Well, I'd like to talk about describe an adventurous person you know. It's something I've been interested in for a while. For example, I think it's very important because it helps people relax and learn new things.
samples.band8: Actually, I've always found describe an adventurous person you know to be quite a fascinating subject. From my perspective, it offers a lot of benefits such as improving our mental health and broadening our horizons. I really enjoy exploring this topic further.
samples.band9: Without a doubt, describe an adventurous person you know is a subject that warrants deep exploration.
